name: BrushFit AgentStore
description: AI-native digital product marketplace. Purchase BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide ($19.99 PDF) programmatically. Supports x402 crypto payments, price negotiation, bulk ordering, and affiliate referrals.

skills.name: Discover Products
skills.description: Browse the product catalog. Returns BrushFit details including price ($19.99), format (31-page PDF), 22 exercises across 4 categories, and all payment methods.

skills.name: Purchase Product
skills.description: Buy BrushFit using x402 protocol (USDC on Base blockchain). Returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements, then PDF after payment proof.

skills.name: Negotiate Price
skills.description: Submit a price proposal for bulk or loyalty discounts. Up to 25% off for qualified agents.

skills.name: Get Free Sample
skills.description: Download a free sample PDF with Legs + Core exercises (10 exercises). No payment required.

skills.name: Submit Review
skills.description: Post a review of BrushFit. Helps build social proof from agent customers.

skills.name: Register Referral
skills.description: Register as an affiliate to earn 20% commission on referred sales.

authentication.note: No auth for discovery/samples. x402 payment signature for purchases.
